name: Menemen (Turkish Scrambled Eggs)
recipeIngredient: 4 tomatoes, cut into pieces with a cross on top
4 green hot peppers, cut into very small rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion finely.
2. Cut a cross in the tops of the tomatoes and place them in hot water. Remove the skins once they are soft.
3. Cut the tomatoes into small pieces.
4. Wash and cut the peppers into very small rings.
5. Heat the butter in a large skillet.
6. Sauté the onion until soft, then add the peppers and tomatoes. Cook for another 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Beat the eggs with salt, pepper, and paprika powder.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables in the skillet.
9. Stir gently with a fork until the eggs are set.
10. Serve on fresh homemade or Turkish bread.
(Note: Be careful when handling the hot peppers. The peppers used here are a cross between parika's and hot peppers, so remove the seeds to reduce heat.)
